description: Tests that to-prd synthesizes a PRD from context with problem statement, user stories, and deep-module decisions

tests.prompt: Skriv en PRD för en ny dashboard-feature.
tests.expected_output_description: Problem-first PRD with user stories, implementation/testing decisions, out-of-scope

assertions.check: Output starts from the problem statement (user's perspective) rather than jumping to the solution
Output includes a list of user stories in an 'As a... I want... so that...' style
Output includes implementation decisions, ideally identifying deep modules
Output mentions testing decisions or which modules will be tested

tests.prompt: Vad är viktigast att börja med i en PRD?
tests.expected_output_description: Problem first, synthesize rather than interview

assertions.check: Output emphasizes starting with the problem, not the solution
Output says to synthesize from existing context rather than interviewing the user at length
